abilitydesc-blacksmith:
Sets the quality parameter for items forged by you.
Quality improves an item's stats and depends on your Metalworking skill, your forging experience with items of a specific type, and luck.

- Maximum quality after forging: 3 > 8
- Maximum overall quality cap: {1}

Base quality depends on:
- Metalworking level: 0.1 quality per level (up to level 25).
- Forging experience: 0.01 quality per crafted item of the same category — tools, armor, or weapons (up to 200 items in each category are counted).

To reach the maximum cap, the part must be quenched
abilitydesc-blaster: Your Stonebreaker, Stonecutter, ore miner and gemstone miner abilities are also applied if you blow up rock or ores with bombs.
abilitydesc-bloodlust: Every time you kill an enemy you will get one stack of the bloodlust effect. It increases your caused damage by {0}% per stack and your received damage by {1}% per stack. This effect can stack up to {3} times and lasts {2} seconds.
abilitydesc-bloomeryexpert: Allows you to take finished products out of the bloomery without destroying it, and at perk level 2, smelt any metal bits directly into ingots.
